name: Sugarless Fruit Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine dates, raisins, prunes, and water. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in margarine and baking soda. Set aside to cool.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (eggs, vanilla extract, flour, baking soda, chopped nuts) to the cooled fruit mixture. Stir until the dry ingredients are just moistened.
4. Spoon the batter into a greased mini-muffin pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. For larger muffins, bake in an 11-inch x 7-inch x 2-inch baking pan for 30 minutes.
6. Yield: 32 muffins
Diabetic Exchanges: One mini-muffin equals, 1/2 fruit, 1 fat, 1/2 starch; also 94 calories, 52 mg sodium, 14 mg cholesterol, 12 gm carbohydrate, 2 gm protein, 4 gm fat.
